briefdescription.para: XV_vscaler_Lanczos2_taps6 Default fixed coefficient set for 6-tap Lanczos2 vertical scaler filter.

detaileddescription.para: Each row represents a phase; columns are tap coefficients. Values are in Q12 fixed-point format.

briefdescription.para: This function loads default filter coefficients in the scaler coefficient storage based on the selected TAP configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This Function Sets the vertical scaler filter coefficients in hardware registers.

detaileddescription.para: This function programs the hardware vertical scaler with the appropriate filter coefficients stored in the XV_Vscaler_l2 instance. It calculates the number of phases and taps, determines the correct offset for the coefficients, and writes the packed coefficients to the hardware registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_Vscaler_l2 instance containing configuration and coefficient data.

simplesect.para: None This version of driver does not make use of computed coefficients. Pre-computed coefficients are stored in a local table which are used to overwrite any computed coefficients before being programmed into the core registers. Control flow still computes the coefficients to maintain the sw latency for driver version which would eventually use computed coefficients

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the core instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to core instance to be worked upon
is instance id of the core

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if device is found and initialized XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if device is not found

briefdescription.para: This function starts the vertical scaler core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function stops the vertical scaler core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_Vscaler_l2 *InstancePtr, u16 num_phases, u16 num_taps, const short *Coeff)
memberdef.name: XV_VScalerLoadExtCoeff

briefdescription.para: This function loads user defined filter coefficients in the scaler coefficient storage.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.
is the number of phases in coefficient table
is the number of taps in coefficient table
is a pointer to user defined filter coefficients table

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_Vscaler_l2 *InstancePtr, u32 WidthIn, u32 HeightIn, u32 HeightOut, u32 ColorFormat)
memberdef.name: XV_VScalerSetup

briefdescription.para: This function configures the scaler core registers with the specified configuration parameters of the AXI stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.
is the color format of the stream.

briefdescription.para: This function prints V Scaler status on the console.

parameterdescription.para: is the instance pointer to the core instance.
